description: CompositionGrey striped and printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, round slit neck with lace detailing, pintucked Bib around the slit of the neckline with thread and lace detailing, lace detailing on the front shoulder panels and back chest, pleated at the back upper chest and has split sides on the hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this grey kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this kurta, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
